mapper.select: SELECT id, name, email, plan FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.plan, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM collaboration_friendship f WHERE f.user_id = #{viewerId} AND f.friend_user_id = u.id ) THEN 'FRIEND' WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM collaboration_friend_request r WHERE r.requester_id = #{viewerId} AND r.receiver_id = u.id AND r.status = 'PENDING' ) THEN 'REQUESTED' WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM collaboration_friend_request r WHERE r.requester_id = u.id AND r.receiver_id = #{viewerId} AND r.status = 'PENDING' ) THEN 'PENDING_INCOMING' ELSE 'NONE' END AS relation_status FROM users u WHERE u.id <> #{viewerId} AND u.status = 'ACTIVE' AND ( LOWER(u.name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(u.email) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') ) ORDER BY u.name ASC, u.id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT f.friend_user_id AS user_id, u.name, u.email, u.status AS user_status, f.created_at FROM collaboration_friendship f JOIN users u ON u.id = f.friend_user_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND u.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY u.name ASC, f.created_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM collaboration_friendship WHERE (user_id = #{userId} AND friend_user_id = #{friendUserId}) OR (user_id = #{friendUserId} AND friend_user_id = #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM collaboration_friend_request WHERE requester_id = #{requesterId} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id, r.status, r.created_at, r.responded_at, rq.id AS requester_id, rq.name AS requester_name, rq.email AS requester_email, rq.status AS requester_status, rc.id AS receiver_id, rc.name AS receiver_name, rc.email AS receiver_email, rc.status AS receiver_status FROM collaboration_friend_request r JOIN users rq ON rq.id = r.requester_id JOIN users rc ON rc.id = r.receiver_id WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.id, r.status, r.created_at, r.responded_at, rq.id AS requester_id, rq.name AS requester_name, rq.email AS requester_email, rq.status AS requester_status, rc.id AS receiver_id, rc.name AS receiver_name, rc.email AS receiver_email, rc.status AS receiver_status FROM collaboration_friend_request r JOIN users rq ON rq.id = r.requester_id JOIN users rc ON rc.id = r.receiver_id WHERE r.receiver_id = #{userId} AND r.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC

SELECT r.id, r.status, r.created_at, r.responded_at, rq.id AS requester_id, rq.name AS requester_name, rq.email AS requester_email, rq.status AS requester_status, rc.id AS receiver_id, rc.name AS receiver_name, rc.email AS receiver_email, rc.status AS receiver_status FROM collaboration_friend_request r JOIN users rq ON rq.id = r.requester_id JOIN users rc ON rc.id = r.receiver_id WHERE r.requester_id = #{userId} AND r.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO collaboration_friend_request (requester_id, receiver_id, status) VALUES (#{requesterId}, #{receiverId}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE collaboration_friend_request SET status = #{status}, responded_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO collaboration_friendship (user_id, friend_user_id, created_by) VALUES (#{userId}, #{friendUserId}, #{createdBy})

INSERT INTO collaboration_conversation (type, user_low_id, user_high_id, title, description, password_hash, max_members, created_by) VALUES (#{type}, #{userLowId}, #{userHighId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{passwordHash}, #{maxMembers}, #{createdBy})
INSERT IGNORE INTO collaboration_conversation_member (conversation_id, user_id, role, status) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{userId}, 'MEMBER', 'ACTIVE')

INSERT INTO collaboration_conversation_member (conversation_id, user_id, role, status, invited_by) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{role}, 'ACTIVE', #{invitedBy}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = 'ACTIVE', role = IF(role = 'OWNER', role, VALUES(role)), invited_by = COALESCE(invited_by, VALUES(invited_by))

INSERT INTO collaboration_conversation_member (conversation_id, user_id, role, status, invited_by, anonymous) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{role}, 'ACTIVE', #{invitedBy}, #{anonymous}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = 'ACTIVE', role = IF(role = 'OWNER', role, VALUES(role)), invited_by = COALESCE(invited_by, VALUES(invited_by)), anonymous = VALUES(anonymous)

INSERT INTO collaboration_conversation_invite (conversation_id, inviter_id, invitee_id, anonymous, status) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{inviterId}, #{inviteeId}, #{anonymous}, 'PENDING') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE inviter_id = VALUES(inviter_id), anonymous = VALUES(anonymous), status = 'PENDING', responded_at = NULL
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM collaboration_conversation_member WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT cm.user_id AS userId, u.name AS name, cm.muted AS muted FROM collaboration_conversation_member cm JOIN users u ON u.id = cm.user_id WHERE cm.conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND cm.status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.sql: c.id, c.type, c.title, c.description, c.image_file_id, c.notice, me.role AS my_role, CASE WHEN c.type = 'PRIVATE' OR c.password_hash IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS locked, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM collaboration_conversation_member cm_count WHERE cm_count.conversation_id = c.id AND cm_count.status = 'ACTIVE' ) AS member_count, CASE WHEN me.user_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS joined, COALESCE(me.muted, 0) AS muted, peer.user_id AS peer_user_id, peer_user.name AS peer_name, peer_user.email AS peer_email, peer_user.status AS peer_status, c.updated_at, lm.id AS latest_message_id, lm.kind AS latest_kind, lm.content AS latest_content, lm.created_at AS latest_created_at, CASE WHEN me.user_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM collaboration_message unread WHERE unread.conversation_id = c.id AND unread.sender_id <> #{userId} AND unread.deleted_at IS NULL AND unread.id > COALESCE(me.last_read_message_id, 0) ) END AS unread_count

LEFT JOIN collaboration_conversation_member me ON me.conversation_id = c.id AND me.user_id = #{userId} AND me.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN collaboration_conversation_member peer ON c.type = 'DIRECT' AND peer.conversation_id = c.id AND peer.user_id <> #{userId} AND peer.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN users peer_user ON peer_user.id = peer.user_id LEFT JOIN collaboration_message lm ON lm.id = ( SELECT MAX(m.id) FROM collaboration_message m WHERE m.conversation_id = c.id AND m.deleted_at IS NULL )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM collaboration_conversation c
WHERE me.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY COALESCE(lm.created_at, c.updated_at) DESC, c.id DESC

SELECT
FROM collaboration_conversation c
WHERE c.id = #{conversationId} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM collaboration_conversation c
WHERE c.type IN ('PUBLIC', 'PRIVATE') AND me.user_id IS NULL
AND ( LOWER(c.title) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(COALESCE(c.description, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') )
ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC, c.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO collaboration_message (conversation_id, sender_id, kind, content) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{senderId}, #{kind}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, u.name AS sender_name, u.email AS sender_email, u.status AS sender_status, cm.anonymous AS sender_anonymous, cm.room_nickname AS sender_room_nickname, cmp.nickname_profile_id AS sender_nickname_profile_id FROM collaboration_message m JOIN users u ON u.id = m.sender_id LEFT JOIN collaboration_conversation_member cm ON cm.conversation_id = m.conversation_id AND cm.user_id = m.sender_id LEFT JOIN conversation_member_profile cmp ON cmp.conversation_id = m.conversation_id AND cmp.user_id = m.sender_id WHERE m.id = #{id}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT m.*, u.name AS sender_name, u.email AS sender_email, u.status AS sender_status, cm.anonymous AS sender_anonymous, cm.room_nickname AS sender_room_nickname, cmp.nickname_profile_id AS sender_nickname_profile_id FROM collaboration_message m JOIN users u ON u.id = m.sender_id LEFT JOIN collaboration_conversation_member cm ON cm.conversation_id = m.conversation_id AND cm.user_id = m.sender_id LEFT JOIN conversation_member_profile cmp ON cmp.conversation_id = m.conversation_id AND cmp.user_id = m.sender_id WHERE m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND m.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} ) recent ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO collaboration_message_attachment (message_id, file_asset_id, share_mode, expires_at) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{fileAssetId}, #{shareMode}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.message_id, a.file_asset_id, f.original_name, f.content_type, f.size_bytes, a.share_mode, a.expires_at, f.owner_user_id, owner.plan AS owner_plan, a.created_at FROM collaboration_message_attachment a JOIN file_asset f ON f.id = a.file_asset_id JOIN users owner ON owner.id = f.owner_user_id WHERE a.message_id = #{messageId} ORDER BY a.id ASC

SELECT a.id, a.message_id, a.file_asset_id, f.original_name, f.content_type, f.size_bytes, a.share_mode, a.expires_at, f.owner_user_id, owner.plan AS owner_plan, a.created_at FROM collaboration_message_attachment a JOIN collaboration_message m ON m.id = a.message_id JOIN collaboration_conversation_member cm ON cm.conversation_id = m.conversation_id AND cm.user_id = #{userId} AND cm.status = 'ACTIVE' JOIN file_asset f ON f.id = a.file_asset_id JOIN users owner ON owner.id = f.owner_user_id WHERE a.file_asset_id = #{fileId} AND m.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT NULL AS id, NULL AS message_id, id AS application_case_id, company_name, job_title, deadline_date, source_type, created_at FROM application_case WHERE id = #{applicationCaseId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO collaboration_message_posting (message_id, application_case_id) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{applicationCaseId})
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.message_id, p.application_case_id, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, ac.deadline_date, ac.source_type, p.created_at FROM collaboration_message_posting p JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = p.application_case_id WHERE p.message_id = #{messageId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY p.id ASC
SELECT MAX(id) FROM collaboration_message WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM collaboration_message_attachment a JOIN collaboration_message m ON m.id = a.message_id JOIN collaboration_conversation_member cm ON cm.conversation_id = m.conversation_id AND cm.user_id = #{userId} AND cm.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE a.file_asset_id = #{fileId} AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_desktop_presence (user_id, last_seen_at) VALUES (#{userId}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE last_seen_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, last_seen_at FROM user_desktop_presence WHERE user_id IN #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO collaboration_conversation_permission (conversation_id, user_id, can_kick, can_ban, can_set_password, can_invite, can_edit_room, can_manage_members, granted_by) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{canKick}, #{canBan}, #{canSetPassword}, #{canInvite}, #{canEditRoom}, #{canManageMembers}, #{grantedBy}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE can_kick = VALUES(can_kick), can_ban = VALUES(can_ban), can_set_password = VALUES(can_set_password), can_invite = VALUES(can_invite), can_edit_room = VALUES(can_edit_room), can_manage_members = VALUES(can_manage_members), granted_by = VALUES(granted_by)
mapper.sql: cm.user_id, u.name, u.email, u.status AS user_status, cm.role, cm.status, cm.anonymous, cm.room_nickname, cm.room_profile_file_id, cm.joined_at, p.can_kick, p.can_ban, p.can_set_password, p.can_invite, p.can_edit_room, p.can_manage_members, CASE WHEN b.user_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS banned

JOIN users u ON u.id = cm.user_id LEFT JOIN collaboration_conversation_permission p ON p.conversation_id = cm.conversation_id AND p.user_id = cm.user_id LEFT JOIN collaboration_conversation_ban b ON b.conversation_id = cm.conversation_id AND b.user_id = cm.user_id AND b.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM collaboration_conversation_member cm
WHERE cm.conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND cm.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY FIELD(cm.role, 'OWNER', 'MANAGER', 'MEMBER'), cm.joined_at ASC, cm.user_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO collaboration_conversation_ban (conversation_id, user_id, banned_by, reason) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{bannedBy}, #{reason}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE banned_by = VALUES(banned_by), reason = VALUES(reason), deleted_at = NULL
mapper.select: SELECT b.user_id, u.name, u.email, u.status AS user_status, b.banned_by, b.reason, b.created_at FROM collaboration_conversation_ban b JOIN users u ON u.id = b.user_id WHERE b.conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND b.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY b.created_at DESC, b.id DESC

SELECT allow.user_id FROM collaboration_conversation_invite_allow allow JOIN users u ON u.id = allow.user_id AND u.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE allow.conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY allow.user_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO collaboration_conversation_invite_allow (conversation_id, user_id, granted_by) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{grantedBy})
INSERT INTO collaboration_conversation_audit (conversation_id, actor_id, target_user_id, action, detail) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{actorId}, #{targetUserId}, #{action}, #{detail})
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.conversation_id, a.actor_id, actor.name AS actor_name, actor.status AS actor_status, a.target_user_id, target.name AS target_name, target.status AS target_status, a.action, a.detail, a.created_at FROM collaboration_conversation_audit a LEFT JOIN users actor ON actor.id = a.actor_id LEFT JOIN users target ON target.id = a.target_user_id WHERE a.conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY a.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
